data: {"generalSituation":"Under the influence of upper-air disturbances, there will still be a few showers over the coast of Guangdong tomorrow. A southerly airstream will bring hot weather to the coast of southern China on Wednesday. Besides, the trough of low pressure now over central China will develop into a cold front in the next couple of days, and edge closer to the coastal areas of southern China gradually. The weather will become unsettled with showers and thunderstorms over the region on Thursday and Friday. Under the influence of the northeast monsoon associated with the cold front, temperatures over Guangdong will fall in the latter part of this week.","weatherForecast":[{"forecastDate":"20260421","week":"Tuesday","forecastWind":"South to southeast force 3 to 4.","forecastWeather":"Mainly cloudy with a few showers.
